title: HeroQuest / Jungles of Delthrak / MegaQuest / Advance Game System
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0luCN1MyFX8

Daniel (@dungeondive) covers a sprawling HeroQuest update: the official Jungles of Delthrak expansion from Avalon Hill, the fan-made MegaQuest system, and the Advance Game System that adds RPG-style progression. It's a lot of HeroQuest ground to cover, and Daniel takes it at a pace that does justice to each.

Jungles of Delthrak brings a new environment and enemies to the table. MegaQuest and the Advance Game System push HeroQuest toward something more campaign-driven and mechanically ambitious. Together, they represent the current state of HeroQuest as a living, evolving system rather than a nostalgia piece gathering dust.

----

Do you think fan-made expansions and rule systems can surpass the official ones, or do they need the publisher's stamp to feel legitimate?
